title: murraya ovatifoliolata
intro: Murraya ovatifoliolata, also known as the Chinese box or orange jasmine, is a small flowering tree native to southern China and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Murraya ovatifoliolata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestion, among others. Herbal preparations of Murraya ovatifoliolata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
